puzzleDescription: Use a loop to go through an array and use an 'if' statement to count how many numbers are even.
objective: Given the array then a variable name, count the even numbers and print the final count.
hints: Inside the loop, use 'if (nums[i] % 2 == 0)' to check for even numbers.
If the condition is true, increment 'evenCount++'.
The loop should run from 'i = 0' to 'i < nums.length'.
